//: Crons are DAILY so the Hobby plan can deploy (Hobby rejects sub-daily crons at build time). reconcile + pulse need to run every 15 min in production: either upgrade to Pro and change their schedules to */15 * * * *, or point a free external scheduler (e.g. cron-job.org) at /api/cron/reconcile and /api/cron/pulse every 15 min with header 'Authorization: Bearer <CRON_SECRET>'. The daily entries below stay as a safety net either way.
